description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a light natural finish, featuring a flat top surface suitable for writing or computer work. The front side includes a set of two storage compartments: a drawer above and a cabinet below, both with small round handles for access. The left side of the desk is open, providing legroom or space for a chair, while the right side is enclosed by the storage units. The back and sides of the desk are plain, with a consistent wood grain texture and no additional features. The desk stands on four short legs, slightly elevating it from the ground. Its design is simple and functional, making it suitable for a variety of urban indoor environments.
description: A light wood desk with a flat top, a drawer and cabinet on the right, and open legroom on the left. The design is simple, functional, and well-suited for work or study.
description_view_0: The left side of the desk, showing a plain, uninterrupted wood panel with no visible features.
description_view_1: The front of the desk, displaying the drawer and cabinet with handles on the right and open legroom on the left.
description_view_2: The right side of the desk, featuring a plain wood panel similar to the left side, with no visible openings or hardware.
description_view_3: The back of the desk, showing a flat, featureless wood panel that encloses the rear.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the drawer and cabinet on the right and open legroom on the left, indicating the front of the desk.
